title: AI Explorers for School Students
subtitle: Classes 6–12 · Understand tech with clarity, not confusion
description: An 8-day student-friendly program that helps school students understand AI, apps, and the digital world through fun analogies, safe tool use, and hands-on mini projects.

days.title: What is AI, Really?
days.description: Discover what artificial intelligence means using everyday analogies — no scary jargon, just clear mental models.

days.title: How Apps & the Internet Work
days.description: Build intuition for how your phone, apps, and the internet connect — explained like a story, not a textbook.
topics: What happens when you tap an app
Privacy basics every student should know

days.title: ChatGPT & AI Assistants — Safely
days.description: Learn to use AI assistants responsibly for homework help, curiosity, and creativity — with clear do's and don'ts.
topics: What ChatGPT can and cannot do
Safe and ethical AI use for students
When to trust (and not trust) AI answers

days.title: Mental Models for Learning Tech
days.description: Learn Verlin Labs' clarity-first frameworks so any new technology feels understandable instead of overwhelming.
topics: Breaking big ideas into small pieces
How to learn any tech topic

days.title: Prompting Like a Pro (Beginner)
days.description: Practice writing prompts that get helpful, accurate responses — a superpower for school projects and curiosity.
topics: Using AI for explanations and revision

days.title: Fun with AI Tools
days.description: Explore age-appropriate AI tools for learning, creativity, and problem-solving in a guided hands-on session.

days.title: Mini Project — Solve a Real Problem
days.description: Apply everything you've learned to a small project — pick a problem you care about and use AI + mental models to explore solutions.

days.title: Showcase & Next Steps
days.description: Present your project, celebrate what you've learned, and get a personalized roadmap for continuing your tech journey.
